# Qwen3-30B-A3B MoE — realistic per-layer group_matmul calls
#
# Architecture: 128 routed experts (126 typically active), topk=8
# hidden_size=2048, expert_intermediate_size=768
# Fused gate+up: K=2048, N=1536 (768x2, gate_W|up_W concatenated)
# Down_proj:     K=768, N=2048
# Weight per expert: ~6MB fused, ~3MB down — fits in per-CCD L3
#
# Format: num_ops, M_per_expert, K, N, iters, src_dt:wei_dt:dst_dt, is_weights_const, warmup, moe_topk, gated_act
#   gated_act: 0 = no activation (down_proj), 1 = silu_and_mul (fused gate+up)
#
# =======================================================================
# DECODE: BS=1, topk=8 -> total_M=8
# =======================================================================
#
